action_set_definitions.name: get_alert_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves active early warning alerts from the sensor network, filtered by zone.

zone_name.description: The name of the zone to query (e.g., 'Northern Buffer Zone').

action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_and_sensor_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks weather conditions and the health/calibration status of ground sensors to identify potential environmental noise.

coordinates.description: [lat, long] of the area to check.

action_set_definitions.name: get_available_drones
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all active drones, their current battery levels, and locations.

action_set_definitions.name: deploy_drone_recon
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a drone to specific coordinates to capture high-resolution visual and thermal data.

action_set_definitions.name: get_behavioral_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the historical behavioral data and past successful deterrence strategies for a specific tagged individual.

example_output.history: Resistant to sound, sensitive to strobe lights

action_set_definitions.name: execute_deterrence
action_set_definitions.description: Activates a specific deterrence mechanism via a drone or ground station.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_economic_loss
action_set_definitions.description: Estimates the economic loss based on crop type and the area size of the breach.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_incident_report
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes a SMART report containing all gathered data, actions taken, and financial impact.

state_description.simulation_timestamp: Current time in the monitoring zone (ISO 8601 format or relative)
state_description.active_drones: Inventory of drones with their ID, current coordinates, and battery percentage
state_description.ground_sensor_network: Status and health of fixed camera traps and acoustic sensors
state_description.weather_conditions: Current environmental factors including visibility, wind speed, and precipitation
state_description.tracked_individuals: Last known coordinates and health vitals of animals fitted with GPS tags

AudioMoth_S4_B.current_reading: Low-frequency infrasonic rumble (15-30Hz) and intermittent snapping sounds

PIR_Motion_S4_01.metadata: High wind interference with nearby vegetation detected

tracked_individuals.notes: Frequently targets Maize during Harvest stage.
